meta.title: Yousef Yagoub — Technology Leader
meta.description: Yousef Yagoub — technology leader for national-scale identity and verification platforms. I turn complexity into clarity, building systems that matter and the teams behind them.

hero.name: Yousef Yagoub
hero.title: I build national-scale identity systems — and the teams behind them.
hero.tagline: Builder, analyzer, and translator. I turn fuzzy requirements into clean systems, bridge business and technology, and make complex things simple.
hero.ecosystemCaption: The national identity ecosystem I help build.
hero.ecosystemAria: Diagram: a central identity hub connected to Nafath, Absher Bio Verification, Mobile Verification, Fingerprint, and Dakhli.

about.heading: I turn complexity into clarity.
about.lead: I'm most alive resolving real pain, finding the hidden gap, and shaping messy operations into clean, repeatable systems. I bridge business and technology, and I make complex things simple.
about.quote: Leave every person and every system you touch a little simpler, a little stronger, and a little more capable than you found it.
more: I lead with humans, not just facts — harsh truths without empathy lose the room. I build the infrastructure first: solid ground before features, in systems and in teams alike.
And I measure success by the people around me — I want them to leave more capable, more confident, and more themselves than when we met.

team.label: Delivery team led end to end

values.heading: What I do
values.intro: Three modes I move between, depending on what the problem needs.

build.title: Build
build.body: Design and deliver systems at scale — architecture, sequencing, tradeoffs, and the infrastructure that holds it all up. Solid ground before features.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.body: Own how the system fits together — the data model, entity definitions, integration contracts, and the rules that govern how it behaves.

translate.title: Translate
translate.body: Bridge business, partners, and regulators — turning the solution into the terms each audience trusts, and owning the credibility of what we say we can do.

platforms.heading: Systems I drive at national scale.
platforms.intro: Identity and verification products I drive — from architecture and delivery through production support and stakeholder leadership.

nafath.name: Nafath
nafath.desc: National digital identity and single sign-on used to authenticate citizens and residents across public and private services — App and Web.
nafath.role: Technical delivery, architecture, and stakeholder leadership across the product surface.

absherBio.name: Absher Bio Verification
absherBio.desc: Biometric identity verification integrated into high-trust government and financial journeys.
absherBio.role: Systems analysis, integration contracts, and delivery to production.

mobileVerification.name: Mobile Verification
mobileVerification.desc: Mobile-number ownership and identity verification for secure onboarding and authentication.
mobileVerification.role: Technical planning, sequencing, and production support.

fingerprint.name: Fingerprint
fingerprint.desc: Fingerprint-based biometric verification for identity assurance in sensitive workflows.

dakhli.name: Dakhli
dakhli.desc: Income and entitlement data verification that lets services make decisions on trusted, consented data.
dakhli.role: Systems analysis, integration design, and delivery.

experience.heading: Experience & leadership
experience.intro: Where I lead today, and the foundation it is built on.

lead.title: Product & Technology Lead — Identity Platforms
lead.body: Own technical delivery for a portfolio of national identity platforms. Lead a cross-functional team across delivery, production support, client onboarding, and software development. Run sprints, set architecture and priorities, make hiring calls, and represent the products to clients, partners, and regulators.

engineer.title: Software Engineer → Systems Analyst
engineer.body: Grew from hands-on engineering — Java, Spring (Web, Data, Security, Cloud), SQL, and React — into systems analysis and technical leadership. The craft underneath the leadership.

emba.title: Executive MBA
emba.body: Sharpening strategy, finance, and business judgment to lead at the intersection of technology and the business.

speaking.title: Public speaking
speaking.body: Building leadership presence through deliberate practice — reps over readiness.

learning.title: Always learning
learning.body: Small doses daily — technology, management, and investing. Staying relevant by never stopping.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.intro: Open to senior technology leadership conversations. The fastest way to reach me is below.
